Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Angler's Workshop
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks 2024
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best of Saltwater Slam
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith outdoors we head up north for alittle musky fishing. Jeff is easily the most knowledgeable musky fisherman i've ever met and you'll learn why i think that in this episode. Stay Tuned
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Musky Tips with JEff VanRemortel
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouths and largemouths alike bust Shaw's baits in Moses Lake, Washington.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Way Out West for Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Monday Morning Fisherman
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Multispecies Mavriks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Extremely remote adventures on FishON! this season. Back to our roots with walleye fishing in Northern Ontario
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Ontario Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Kirk show you how to catch big spring crappies relating to bait fish in open water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors - Open Water Crappie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're heading over to the Detroit river this week to hook up with our good friend Jason Julien from Church Tackle. We'll be teaching the in's and out's of using his excellent boards to catch some walleye!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Detroit River Trolling
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Local guide, Marcel Veenstra accompanies Kim to Indian River, Michigan for giant smallmouths. The fall feed is on and Strike King's "Tour Grade Titanium Umbrella Rig" pays off in a big way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Gorillas on a Chandelier
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 2
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Wilderness Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: One of the best parts of traveling is the pleasant surprises that come along every trip. In last week's episode, Shea McIntee and the crew had a remarkable day of Marlin fishing in Madalena Bay. Now we find out Madalena Bay doesn't only have fantastic offshore fishing, it also has inshore fishing that is out of this world. Shea's captain takes us to some of his favorite spots to catch Red Snapper, Snook, Corbina, and a fish we have never seen before, Palometa.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - The Magdalena Bay Experience, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In 1966, a 19-year-old, Wisconsin farm boy's life changed forever when he was drafted into the Army and shipped over to Vietnam. Now a soldier, Glenn engaged in numerous battles, and scouted for the infamous "tunnel rats" in the Vietnam War. The lone survivor in his platoon, the most heart-breaking s
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Vietnam Veteran Glenn Franks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Lazy Lake Shootout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This show was filmed in late October of 2019. Four months prior, in June of 2019, Tim Carnahan was diagnosed with Glioblastoma, Brain Cancer. According to Tim's medical team, his life expectancy could be between three months and 18 months. Fast forward to now, 2020; today's update is one we hoped would never come. With a heavy heart and tear-filled eyes, we share with you that Tim Carnahan has passed away after battling for close to 12 months. It only fits that the last words to pass his lips were I love you, Lory, and keep fishing. While his time on earth was cut short, the amount of joy he experienced and shared with others was genuinely tremendous and will never be forgotten. If you would like to help out in any way, lory and friends have put together a Go Fund Me page to ease the financial burden of medical bills and afford lory some time to greave and transition into life without Tim. We love you, Tim. Rest in peace, buddy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner target Summer Peak largemouth bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Primetime Summer Largemouth Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Dead in the Water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Spinnerbaits

Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | River Bass
